sql.query: SELECT ws.id,ws.workflowId,ws.stageName,ws.description,ws.sortOrder,CASE WHEN COUNT(t.id)=0 THEN 'not_started' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.isRequired=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN t.isRequired=1 AND t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)=0 THEN 'complete' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status NOT IN ('complete','skipped','cancelled') AND t.dueDate<CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'overdue' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('in_progress','complete') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'in_progress' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN t.status='waiting' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'waiting' ELSE 'not_started' END AS status,ws.colour,ws.startedDate,ws.completedDate,CAST(COUNT(t.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS taskCount,CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN t.status='complete' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS UNSIGNED) AS completedTaskCount FROM tbl_workflow_stages ws INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=ws.workflowId AND w.tenantId=ws.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_tasks t ON t.workflowStageId=ws.id AND t.tenantId=ws.tenantId WHERE ws.workflowId=:workflowId AND ws.tenantId=:tenantId GROUP BY ws.id ORDER BY ws.sortOrder,ws.id
